modules.sql: SELECT CAST(investment_id AS INTEGER) AS investment_id, CAST(customer_id AS INTEGER) AS customer_id, COALESCE(account_type, '') AS account_type, COALESCE(current_value, 0) AS current_value, COALESCE(risk_profile, 'Unknown') AS risk_profile, CASE WHEN COALESCE(current_value, 0) > 250000 THEN 'High Value' WHEN COALESCE(current_value, 0) > 50000 THEN 'Medium Value' ELSE 'Low Value' END AS risk_tier, as_of FROM investments
